scope_note: QA Graph Community Cert family [158]: certifies QA feature map dimensions (qa21=21, qa27=27, qa83=83 invariants from (b,e) tuples) and community detection benchmarks on standard networks (football 115 nodes, karate 34 nodes, dolphins 62 nodes). Feature maps compute canonical 16 QA identities + chromogeometric invariants. Chromogeometry check: C^2+F^2=G^2 (Wildberger Theorem 6). Source: codex_on_QA/ Rust spectral clustering + Python Louvain pipeline.
